summary: All three P1 findings are incorrect. The current task-manifest.json already contains the allegedly missing signature_changes entries: EvidenceBundleInsert (Task 4, lines 178-181), EvidenceScopeQuery, EvidenceSourceFilter, and EvidenceRunConflictError (Task 5, lines 218-236), and EvidenceValidationResult and EvidenceValidationIssue (Task 2, lines 81-87). No edits to plan.md or task-manifest.json are required.
rebuttal: Finding [P1] Task 4 claims EvidenceBundleInsert is missing from signature_changes, but it is present at lines 178-181 of task-manifest.json. Finding [P1] Task 5 claims EvidenceScopeQuery, EvidenceSourceFilter, EvidenceRunConflictError, and receipt types are missing, but all are present in signature_changes at lines 218-236 of task-manifest.json (EvidenceBundleReceipt at 226-228, EvidenceBundleRecord at 230-232, EvidenceRunConflictError at 234-236). Finding [P1] Task 2 claims EvidenceValidationResult and EvidenceValidationIssue are missing, but both are present at lines 81-87 of task-manifest.json. The plan and manifest are already correct; the findings appear to have been generated against a stale version of task-manifest.json.
